briefdescription.para: Learning mode (guarantee unique names)
Mode.
Tuning mode.
adds new templates to the database

parameterdescription.para: new template name (object + time stamp in this case)

briefdescription.para: builds the vocabulary tree and trains the database

detaileddescription.para: publish when object was detected publish rect with ROI region of interest extract an image from another one

briefdescription.para: loads the database, that is images.tree, images.weights, images.documents
Create a visualization window and start the visualization threas.
only called with "sift_only" command argument for extracting of keypoints
saves images.tree, images.weights, images.documents
saves images.weights, images.documents (faster than save_database function)
Validate the given threshold and set it (1.0 if invalid)
Create a visualization window and start the visualization threas.
writes the statistics of the recognition process in a package
Clears the sequence buffer.
extracts SIFT keypoints
extract keypoints from training images and optionally saves them

parameterdescription.para: whether to save images or not

briefdescription.para: Adds the current result to the sequence buffer in order to be visualized later by visualize_sequence.

parameterdescription.para: keypoints extracted in the input image

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *dir, const char *prefix, std::vector< FeatureVector > &images, bool onlySaveImages=false)
memberdef.name: trace_directory

briefdescription.para: recursively traces the directory with images

parameterdescription.para: whether we only extract keypoints and save images with them

briefdescription.para: Accumulates the scores from the clusters and updates the map of matches (matches_map) which is a map of Document IDs and their scores in the database.

parameterdescription.para: - vector of Match-es (see vocabulary tree API)

briefdescription.para: visualization function

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to the vector containing the keypoints extracted in the input image or NULL if no keypoints are provided

briefdescription.para: Visualizes the stored sequence.
